title: Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote)
description: Role : Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Full-Time Payout : $230K - $280K/yr Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) - US to work on a full-time basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and backend services. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and optimize full-stack applications using React.js for frontend and Node.js for backend services. • Design and implement RESTful APIs and database schemas to support application functionality. • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code while adhering to best practices and coding standards. • Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues across the stack to ensure system reliability. • Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and sprint planning to drive continuous improvement. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in React.js and Node.js with a strong understanding of their ecosystems. • Experience with frontend technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). • Familiarity with backend frameworks like Express.js and database systems such as PostgreSQL or MongoDB. • Knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git, and CI/CD pipelines. • Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha) and debugging tools. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of mission-critical applications. The position provides exposure to cutting-edge technologies and collaborative problem-solving in a distributed team environment. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Backend Engineer | $42/hr Remote
description: Position: Backend Engineer (JSON Schema Developer) Type: Hourly contract Compensation: $40 - $42/hour Location: Remote Commitment: 10 40 hours/week Role Responsibilities Analyze complex documents to identify and model structured data points. Design and implement robust JSON schemas with appropriate field types and structure. Define validation rules, constraints, and logical relationships within schemas. Develop API contracts to ensure seamless data integration across systems. Collaborate with stakeholders to refine data requirements and schema design. Document schema structures, field definitions, and usage guidelines clearly. Promote best practices in data modeling, architecture, and scalability. Requirements Strong experience in data modeling, schema design, and JSON schema development. Expertise in creating deeply nested and scalable data structures. Strong understanding of validation logic, field typing, and schema constraints. Ability to translate unstructured data into structured models. Experience defining API contracts and data integration workflows. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work independently in a remote, distributed environment. Application Process (Takes 20 Min) Easy Apply on LinkedIn Check email for next steps Participate in resume evaluation & interview stage

title: Senior Backend Engineer - Node.js & AWS (Remote)
description: Role : Senior Backend Engineer - Node.js & AWS (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Contract Payout : $20 - $70/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Senior Backend Engineer (Node.js, AWS) to work on a contract basis. The role involves designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend services for a high-traffic platform. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver efficient, low-latency solutions in a cloud-native environment. Key Responsibilities: • Design, build, and deploy Node.js-based microservices using AWS services. • Optimize backend systems for performance, scalability, and reliability. • Implement RESTful and GraphQL APIs with a focus on security and efficiency. • Lead architectural decisions for cloud infrastructure, including EC2, Lambda, and RDS. • Monitor system health, debug issues, and implement automated testing and CI/CD pipelines. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Minimum 5 years of experience with Node.js backend development. • Strong proficiency in AWS services such as EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS, and CloudFormation. • Experience with RESTful and GraphQL API design and implementation. • Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and orchestration (Kubernetes or ECS). • Knowledge of databases, including PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or DynamoDB. • Experience with automated testing (unit, integration, and end-to-end). • Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code tools like Terraform. • Ability to work independently in a remote, distributed team environment. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of a platform serving millions of users worldwide. The contract includes competitive compensation and flexibility to work from anywhere. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack)
description: Who Are We? Profen, founded in 1995, is a global company that offers products and services to the Communication Technologies, Defense Technologies, Teleport & Satellite Network Services, Media & Broadcasting sectors with its growing R&D center. PROFEN, headquartered in Istanbul, offers innovative and high-tech solutions with its Ankara and Konya offices. PROFEN continues its activities by offering solutions in the following areas: Telecommunication Infrastructures Satellite Ground Segment Systems Data Center Design and Installation Defense Technologies Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or related disciplines 7+ years of professional Java experience in web-based technologies (design, development, and maintenance) Hands-on experience with Java 8, 11, 17, and 21 Proficient in Git and Maven Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with Amazon AWS Strong experience with relational databases (RDBMS), preferably PostgreSQL Proven experience in SQL query optimization Full-stack development experience with Angular or React on the front-end Solid understanding of RESTful JSON APIs, SOA, and Event-Driven Architectures Experience with container technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes, or OpenShift Familiarity with messaging platforms (Kafka, EMS, ActiveMQ, and/or IBM MQ) Experience with monitoring and alerting tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and ElasticSearch Preferably experienced in the aviation MRO / logistics domain Ability to read and understand technical documentation in English Job Description Design and develop required enhancements for the existing visioMAX software Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve software defects and performance issues Write and maintain unit and integration test codes Collaborate closely with users and stakeholders to understand software requirements and user needs Manage cloud-based and on-premise deployment, maintenance, and operational support processes Take an active role in designing, developing, and maintaining highly available and resilient applications

title: .NET Backend Developer Intern
description: Bluesense is a cutting-edge AI company specializing in artificial intelligence, computer vision, and machine learning. We build AI-driven products and provide AI integration and consultancy services, transforming data science and deep learning into practical solutions for real-world problems. Our work connects with innovation ecosystems and product initiatives such as a Smart Beauty App, aligned with communities like Harvard Innovation Labs (Harvard University) and ITU ARI Teknokent / ARI Çekirdek. This is a full-time remote, unpaid compulsory internship role for a .NET Backend Developer at Bluesense. The intern will contribute to real product development by building and improving backend services using C# and ASP.NET Core, focusing on clean architecture, reliable APIs, and scalable system design. You’ll work on: Building and maintaining RESTful APIs for production-style applications Designing and implementing backend services, business logic, and data workflows Working with databases and optimizing data access layers Ensuring system reliability, performance, and security best practices Collaborating with a remote team through task tracking, code reviews, and iterative delivery Develop backend features using C# and ASP.NET Core based on product requirements and system designs Design and implement RESTful APIs (controllers, services, DTOs, request/response models) Work with databases (SQL Server / PostgreSQL) including schema design, queries, and optimization Apply OOP principles and clean architecture practices (layered architecture, separation of concerns, SOLID basics) Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, role-based access control basics) Handle error management, logging, and validation to ensure robust and predictable APIs Improve backend quality through: Debugging and fixing issues Refactoring for readability, scalability, and maintainability Basic performance improvements (query optimization, caching awareness) Work in a remote workflow: Use Git (branches, commits, pull requests) Participate in code reviews Communicate progress clearly and deliver tasks incrementally Solid knowledge of C# and .NET / ASP.NET Core Understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, SOLID basics) Familiarity with REST API design principles Basic knowledge of databases and SQL Strong problem-solving mindset: able to investigate backend issues and debug systematically Comfortable working independently in a remote environment (time management, clear updates) Developed backend features using C# and ASP.NET Core , building RESTful APIs based on product requirements Designed and implemented service-layer architecture following clean architecture principles Built and maintained REST APIs , including request validation, business logic, and structured responses Worked with SQL databases , writing queries and improving data access efficiency Implemented authentication/authorization flows (e.g., JWT-based systems) Improved system reliability through debugging, refactoring, and performance optimizations Collaborated in a remote team workflow using Git, pull requests, and code review feedback Documented API behavior and backend logic to support team collaboration and maintainability Tech: C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET Core, REST APIs, SQL Server/PostgreSQL, Entity Framework Core, OOP, Clean Architecture, Git 📌 Note: This is a compulsory internship and is unpaid. 📩 To apply: Send CV + GitHub/portfolio + backend project examples to taner@bluesense.ai or DM.
